gear.name: Shield
gear.effect: +1 Defence

gear.name: Light Armour
gear.effect: Standard protection. +1 Def

gear.name: Heavy Armour
gear.effect: +2 Defence, -1 Movement

gear.name: Mount
gear.effect: 10 Movement, +4 Wounds

gear.name: Iron Banner
gear.effect: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Defence characteristic of visible friendly fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.

gear.name: Ensnaring Net
gear.effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 3" of this fighter. Until the end of the battle round, that enemy fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions.

gear.name: Fanged Buckler
gear.effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter and roll a dice. On a roll of 3+, allocate 3 damage points to that fighter.

gear.name: Healing Potion
gear.effect: Remove 3 damage points. This item is destroyed after use.

gear.name: Swiftwind Dust
gear.effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to this Fighter's move characteristic for the remainder of the game.

gear.name: Silkstrider Webbing
gear.effect: This fighter does not suffer impact damage from falls.

gear.name: Skin of Flame-Ale
gear.effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to this Fighter's Weapon Skill characteristic for the remainder of the game.

gear.name: Jar of Chamonic Glowflies
gear.effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to the value of abilities used by this Fighter for the remainder of the game.

gear.name: Carvolax-scale Anklet
gear.effect: Add 1 to the move characteristic of this Fighter.

gear.name: Chronomantic Dial
gear.effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to the Attacks value of Melee weapons carried by this fighter for the remainder of the turn.

gear.name: Ironoak Seed
gear.effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to this Fighter's Defence characteristic for the remainder of the game.

gear.name: Greater Healing Potion
gear.effect: Remove 6 damage points. This item is destroyed after use.

gear.name: Godbeast Idol
gear.effect: Add 1 to the value of abilities (to a maximum of 6) used by this Fighter.

gear.name: Vial of Jabberslythe Blood
gear.effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to critical hits for melee attacks made by this fighter this activaiton.

gear.name: Ur-Gold Sigil
gear.effect: Increase this Fighter's Defence by 1.

gear.name: Blight Serpent Venom
gear.effect: Add 1 to the Weapon Skill of this Fighter.

gear.name: Bauble of Shadows
gear.effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to gain the Fly trait for the remainder of the turn.

gear.name: Flask of Aqua Ghyranis
gear.effect: Reaction. Destroy this item to re-roll an injury roll, the new result must be retained.

gear.name: Pendant of Bloodglass
gear.effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to the Attacks value of Ranged weapons carried by this fighter for the remainder of the turn.

gear.name: Raven-Feather Necklace
gear.effect: Reaction. At any point in a game, a Fighter may destroy this item to add 1 to critical hits for Ranged attacks made by this fighter this activation.

gear.name: Rune-Etched Vambraces
gear.effect: Reaction. After dice have been rolled but before damage applied, a Fighter may destroy this item to reduce the damage of each hit and crit by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

gear.name: Harrying Raven
gear.effect: Pick an enemy fighter within 20" of this fighter. Until the end of the battle round, that fighter cannot make disengage actions.

fighter_traits.name: Leader
fighter_traits.effect: Choose two friendly fighters within 6" of this model. Both fighters may immediately perform a free 3" move (this cannot be used to leave Melee Range).

fighter_traits.name: Ally
fighter_traits.effect: This fighter may only join a warband if the roster is exhausted and the warband has not yet hit the points limit. This fighter does not count for Roster points and after the mission, this fighter is removed.

fighter_traits.name: Plunging Killers
fighter_traits.effect: Add 2 to the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee attack actions made by friendly fighters with this battle trait if they finished a move action 2" or more vertically lower than their starting position this activation.

fighter_traits.name: Raptor Strike
fighter_traits.effect: Reaction: A fighter can make this reaction after an enemy fighter finishes a move action visible to this fighter, within 5" horizontally and vertically lower than this fighter. This fighter makes a bonus move action and must finish closer to that enemy fighter than they were at the start of that move action. If this fighter ends that move within 1" of that enemy fighter, this fighter does not suffer impact damage and that enemy fighter suffers impact damage.

fighter_traits.name: Raven Dart
fighter_traits.effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 8" of this fighter and roll a dice. On a roll of 2-4, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. On a roll of 5+, allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.

fighter_traits.name: Swift Climb
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, do not count the vertical distance moved when this fighter is climbing.

fighter_traits.name: Swooping Attack
fighter_traits.effect: This fighter makes a bonus move action. In addition, if the fighter finishes that move action 2" or more vertically lower than their starting position, they can make a bonus attack action.

fighter_traits.name: Grisly Trophy
fighter_traits.effect: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee attack actions made by visible friendly fighters while they are within 9" of this fighter.

fighter_traits.name: Death from Above
fighter_traits.effect: This fighter makes a bonus move action. Then, they can make a bonus attack action. Add 1 to the Weapon Skill characteristic of that attack action if the fighter finished the move action 2" or more vertically lower than their starting position.

fighter_traits.name: Throwing Stars and Chakrams
fighter_traits.effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter and roll 2 dice. For each roll of 4-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each roll of 6, allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.

fighter_traits.name: Acrobatic Leap
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add 1 to their Move characteristic, and they can fly when making move actions; however, when flying, they cannot move vertically upwards more than 3".

fighter_traits.name: Shattered Gloom Globe
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic (to a minimum of 1) of attack actions made by enemy fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.

fighter_traits.name: Spinning Somersault Strike
fighter_traits.effect: After a friendly fighter with this battle trait uses an ability, roll a dice. On a 5+, add one wild dice to your saved wild dice.

fighter_traits.name: Matchless Acrobats
fighter_traits.effect: After a friendly fighter with this battle trait uses an ability, roll a dice. On a 5+, add one wild dice to your saved wild dice.

fighter_traits.name: Unexpected Assault
fighter_traits.effect: A fighter can make this reaction after an enemy fighter finishes a move action visible to this fighter and within 3" of this fighter. Pick another friendly fighter with the Cypher Lords faction runemark and the Mystic runemark. That fighter makes a bonus move action. After that move action that fighter must be within 1" of the enemy fighter that made the move action.

fighter_traits.name: Shadowy Recall
fighter_traits.effect: Pick a friendly fighter with the Minion runemark. Remove that fighter from the battlefield, then set that fighter up on a platform or the battlefield floor within 6" of this fighter.

fighter_traits.name: We Make War
fighter_traits.effect: After the initiative phase, starting with the attacker, each player whose warband has this battle trait can pick a [double], [triple], or [quad] they have. Change the value of those ability dice to 6.

fighter_traits.name: Clashing Iron
fighter_traits.effect: Reaction. A fighter can make this reaction after they are targeted by a melee attack action but before the hit rolls are made. Count up to two critical hits from that attack action as hits instead.

fighter_traits.name: Throw Bolas
fighter_traits.effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter and roll 2 dice. For each roll of 4-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each roll of 6, allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.

fighter_traits.name: Lead with Weapon Skill
fighter_traits.effect: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. This fighter makes a bonus move action or a bonus attack action.

fighter_traits.name: Living Battering Ram
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, the next time this fighter finishes a move action within 1" of an enemy fighter, pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter. Allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.

fighter_traits.name: Weapons Dripping with Poison
fighter_traits.effect: Once per battle round, a friendly fighter with this battle trait can use the 'Poisoned Attacks' ability without needing or spending any ability dice. Treat the value of that ability as 6.

fighter_traits.name: Vicious Riposte
fighter_traits.effect: Reaction. A fighter can make this reaction after they are targeted by a melee attack action but before the hit rolls are made. For each hit roll of 1 or 2 from that attack action, allocate 2 damage points to the attacking fighter.

fighter_traits.name: Poisoned Attacks
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, the Weapon Skill characteristic of attack actions made by this fighter count as being higher than the target's Defence characteristic.

fighter_traits.name: Snake Charmer
fighter_traits.effect: Pick a friendly Serpents fighter within 4" of this fighter. That fighter makes a bonus attack action.

fighter_traits.name: Relentless Assault
fighter_traits.effect: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. This fighter makes a bonus move action. Then, they can make a bonus attack action.

fighter_traits.name: Paralysing Venom
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add the value of this ability to the damage points allocated to enemy fighters by each critical hit from attack actions made by this fighter. In addition, until the end of this fighter's activation, after each attack action made by this fighter, roll a dice. On a roll of 5+, until the end of this battle round, the target fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions.

fighter_traits.name: Shared Bliss
fighter_traits.effect: Once per battle, after an enemy fighter is taken down by the damage points allocated by the 'Shared Pain' reaction, roll a dice. On a 3+, you gain a [quad] ability dice with a value of 1.

fighter_traits.name: Shared Pain
fighter_traits.effect: Reaction. A fighter can make this reaction after they are targeted by a melee attack action but before the hit rolls are made. For each hit roll from that attack action that hits, allocate 1 damage point to the attacking fighter. For each critical hit, allocate 2 damage points to the attacking fighter instead.

fighter_traits.name: Nightmarish Visage
fighter_traits.effect: Pick an enemy fighter within a number of inches of this fighter equal to the value of this ability and roll a dice. On a roll of 3+, until the end of the battle round, that fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions.

fighter_traits.name: Barbed Strike
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, if an attack action made by this fighter scores any hits or critical hits, subtract 1 from the target fighter's Defence characteristic (to a minimum of 1) until the end of the battle round.

fighter_traits.name: Paralysing Venom
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add the value of this ability to the damage points allocated to enemy fighters by each critical hit from attack actions made by this fighter. In addition, until the end of this fighter's activation, after each attack action made by this fighter, roll a dice. On a roll of 5+, until the end of this battle round, the target fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions.

fighter_traits.name: Paralysing Venom
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add the value of this ability to the damage points allocated to enemy fighters by each critical hit from attack actions made by this fighter. In addition, until the end of this fighter's activation, after each attack action made by this fighter, roll a dice. On a roll of 5+, until the end of this battle round, the target fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions.

fighter_traits.name: Flaying Frenzy
fighter_traits.effect: Roll a dice for each visible enemy fighter within 3" of this fighter. On a roll of 3-4, allocate 1 damage point to the fighter being rolled for. On a roll of 5+, allocate a number of damage points to the fighter being rolled for equal to the value of this ability.

fighter_traits.name: Vessel of Torment
fighter_traits.effect: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. This fighter can make a bonus move action. Then, this fighter can make a bonus attack action.

fighter_traits.name: Gift of Agony
fighter_traits.effect: This fighter makes a bonus attack action. Add 3 to the Weapon Skill and Attacks characteristics of that attack action if this fighter has 1 or more damage points allocated to them.

fighter_traits.name: Worthy Prey
fighter_traits.effect: At the start of each battle round, if no enemy fighters are your worthy prey, pick an enemy fighter. That fighter is your worthy prey. While that fighter is your worthy prey, abilities that target that fighter are treated as having a value of 6.

fighter_traits.name: Brute Resilience
fighter_traits.effect: A fighter can make this reaction when they are targeted by a melee attack action but before the hit rolls are made. Subtract 1 from the damage points allocated to this fighter by each hit from that attack action (to a minimum of 1).

fighter_traits.name: Savage Fury
fighter_traits.effect: Add 1 to the Move characteristic of this fighter for the next move action they make in this activation, and add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the next attack action made by this fighter in this activation.

fighter_traits.name: All-out Attack
fighter_traits.effect: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. This fighter makes a bonus move action or a bonus attack action.

fighter_traits.name: Beastmaster
fighter_traits.effect: Pick a visible friendly fighter with the Beast runemark within 4" of this fighter. That fighter makes a bonus attack action.

fighter_traits.name: Pounce
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, the next time this fighter finishes a move action within 1" of an enemy fighter, pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter. Allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.

fighter_traits.name: Unleash the Beast
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of the battle round, add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the Attacks and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee attack actions made by this fighter.

fighter_traits.name: Hurl Masonry
fighter_traits.effect: A fighter can only use this ability if they are within 1" of an obstacle. Pick a visible enemy fighter within 8" of this fighter and roll a dice. On a roll of 2-4, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. On a roll of 5+, allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.

fighter_traits.name: Rampaging Charge
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, the next time this fighter finishes a move action within 1" of an enemy fighter, pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter. Allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.

fighter_traits.name: Berserk
fighter_traits.effect: A fighter can only use this ability if 20 or more damage points have been allocated to them. Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of the next melee attack action made by this fighter in this activation.

fighter_traits.name: Arcane Fury
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add the value of this ability to the damage points allocated to enemy fighters by each critical hit from melee attack actions made by this fighter.

fighter_traits.name: Blood Marshal
fighter_traits.effect: Pick a visible friendly fighter within 4" of this fighter. Allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. If that fighter is not taken down, they can make a bonus melee attack action.

fighter_traits.name: Telepathic Threatening
fighter_traits.effect: Pick an enemy fighter within a number of inches of this fighter equal to the value of this ability and roll a dice. On a roll of 3+, until the end of the battle round, that fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions.

fighter_traits.name: Dominate Mind
fighter_traits.effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter and roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability. For each roll of 2-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each roll of 6, allocate 3 damage points to that fighter.

fighter_traits.name: Charm
fighter_traits.effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within a number of inches of this fighter equal to the value of this ability. That fighter cannot activate or make reactions in this battle round.

fighter_traits.name: Cower
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of the battle round, count each critical hit from attack actions that target this fighter as a hit instead.

fighter_traits.name: Crazed Flock
fighter_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, for each other friendly fighter within 3" of this fighter that has the same runemarks as this fighter, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee attack actions made by this fighter.

fighter_traits.name: Outrunner of Chaos
fighter_traits.effect: Add 3 to this fighter's Move characteristic for their next move action in this activation.

weapon_traits.name: Block
weapon_traits.effect: Reaction: After a ranged attack has been rolled against this fighter but before damage is calculated, change a crit to a hit.

weapon_traits.name: Brutal
weapon_traits.effect: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action or ability made by this fighter during this activation. This fighter makes a bonus attack action.

weapon_traits.name: Cleaving
weapon_traits.effect: Allocate a number of damage points equal to half the value of this ability (rounding up) to all visible enemy fighters within 1" of this fighter.

weapon_traits.name: Crushing
weapon_traits.effect: Until the end of the Mission round, increase the Weapon Skill of attacks with this weapon by 2.

weapon_traits.name: Overwhelming
weapon_traits.effect: After an attack with this weapon does damage, push the fighter who took damage back 2 inches.

weapon_traits.name: Parry
weapon_traits.effect: Reaction: A fighter can make this reaction after they have been hit by a melee attack action but before damage is assigned. Change one hit from that attack action to a miss (this cannot modify a crit).

weapon_traits.name: Piercing
weapon_traits.effect: Until the end of the Mission round, attacks with this weapon do +1 damage on a critical hit.

weapon_traits.name: Precise
weapon_traits.effect: Until the end of the Mission round, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of attack actions made by this weapon.

weapon_traits.name: Quick
weapon_traits.effect: Before attacking with this weapon, this fighter can take a 2 inch move (but not disengage).

weapon_traits.name: Riposte
weapon_traits.effect: Reaction: A fighter can make this reaction after a melee attack targeting them was rolled with no hits or crits, the attacker takes one hit's worth of damage from the Riposte weapon.

weapon_traits.name: Barbed
weapon_traits.effect: Allocate a number of damage points equal to half the value of this ability to a fighter who has taken damage from this weapon this turn.

weapon_traits.name: Sprint
weapon_traits.effect: Increase the movement value of this fighter by 1 until the end of their activation.

weapon_traits.name: Thrown
weapon_traits.effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter and roll 2 dice. For each roll of 4-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each roll of 6, allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.

weapon_traits.name: Low Sweeping Blow
weapon_traits.effect: Roll a dice for each visible enemy fighter within 2" of this fighter. On a roll of 4-5, allocate 1 damage point to the fighter being rolled for. On a roll of 6, allocate a number of damage points to the fighter being rolled for equal to the value of this ability.

weapon_traits.name: Spine-crushing Blow
weapon_traits.effect: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add the value of this ability to the Weapon Skill characteristic of this fighter.

weapon_traits.name: Whirlwind of Death
weapon_traits.effect: Allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to all visible enemy fighters within 3" of this fighter.

weapon_traits.name: Chain Garrotte
weapon_traits.effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 5" of this fighter and roll a dice. On a roll of 3-4, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. On a roll of 5+, allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.

weapon_traits.name: Harpoon Snag
weapon_traits.effect: This fighter makes a bonus attack action. After that attack action, the target of that attack action makes a bonus move action directly towards this fighter, as if they were jumping, a number of inches equal to the value of this ability. When doing so, they can move away from enemy fighters within 1" at the start of that move action.
